---
# title 设置论文列表页面的标题。
title: "Publications"
---

## Preprints

1. **Paper title.** With Coauthor Name. *Preprint*, 2026.  
   [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/) · [PDF](#) · [Journal](#)

## Publications

Add papers in reverse chronological order. A convenient format is:

1. **Title.** With coauthors. *Journal Name* **Volume** (Year), pages.  
   [arXiv](#) · [DOI](#)
